settingsDesc: Customize the platform language and general options for your site.
dailyStatusDescriptionText: Write your daily clinic status here (e.g., exceptional attendance times, substitute doctor, expected congestion, emergency closure). The chatbot will use this phrase to automatically update all its answers to patients today!
dailyStatusTextareaPlaceholder: Write daily clinic status here... (e.g. Dentist is present today from 10 AM to 8 PM, we recommend booking in advance to avoid waiting)
clinicProfileDesc: Basic static data to introduce the chatbot to your location and contact details
platformFree: In-Platform: 100% Free & Unlimited for Doctor & Patients! 🆓
outsidePlatform: Off-Platform Notification Channels (WhatsApp, Telegram, Messenger, Instagram):
alert10Percent: Warning: Off-platform alert message balance is low (less than 10% remaining)!
alertExpired: Notice: Off-platform subscription has expired! Automated WhatsApp/Telegram notifications are paused, but the in-platform chat and bookings remain 100% free and unlimited ✓
previewBarLabel: You are currently in live preview mode for patients of
returnedToSaaSNotif: Returned to Shafi SaaS Platform successfully!
adminModeDesc: You are currently in the clinic admin panel to customize the chatbot and manage appointments.
previewClinicBtn: Preview Live Clinic Site for Your Patients 🌐
copyrightLabel: © 2026 {clinic} - All rights reserved to the clinic.
madeWithSkill: Crafted with skill to empower medical clinics with secure AI
saasCopyright: © 2026 Shafi Smart AI - Clinic Chatbot Training & Management Platform. All rights reserved.
saasFooterNote: Crafted with passion to empower clinics with secure and precise AI
statusReady: Ready to receive your medical bookings today 🟢
statusClosed: The clinic is currently closed outside working hours 🕒
statusFull: Sorry, bookings are fully booked today 🔴
clinicMotto: Your health is our passion and primary responsibility
clinicSubDesc: Welcome to our premium clinic under the supervision of Dr. {doctor}. We strive to provide the highest levels of medical quality and comfort to our valued patients, and we provide you with a unique medical chatbot to facilitate your bookings and provide instant reliable answers to your questions 24/7.
descServices: We offer a comprehensive package of health services with the highest medical standards and transparent pricing.
loadingServicesDesc: Please Doctor, enter the admin dashboard to select a clinic preset.
chatBannerSub: Online to answer your queries and book your appointment instantly
chatDesc: Speak directly with the clinic's smart chatbot at any time! The chatbot is programmed with a strict knowledge isolation system, meaning it will answer you with absolute accuracy about prices, procedures, and instructions specified by Dr. {doctor}, and guarantees you a fast and secure booking in seconds.
feat1Desc: The chatbot will not make medical guesses, it strictly follows approved clinic protocols and prices.
feat2Desc: It automatically checks daily booking limits and rejects bookings when fully booked to protect clinic schedule.
feat3Desc: It registers your requests and sends appointment details instantly to the dashboard for us to contact and confirm.
aboutClinicText: We proudly work at {clinic} to provide the highest standards of care and integrated medical treatments, ensuring a sterile, healthy, and comfortable environment.
aboutDoctorText: Under the permanent supervision of Dr. {doctor}, we guarantee the application of the best international medical protocols using the latest technologies.
hoursDays: Saturday to Thursday (Friday is the weekend holiday)
faqDesc: Get direct, fast, doctor-approved answers to important questions and treatment guidelines before your visit.
botDefaultUpdateText: The clinic is operating on official hours. Welcome anytime!
platformDesc: An integrated platform to connect clinics with patients and facilitate treatment bookings with high security and reliability using exclusive medical AI engines.
welcomeMessage:
Welcome to "{clinicName}" Chatbot! 🌸
I am your smart assistant programmed to answer accurately and exclusively about the clinic's services, prices, and guidelines.
How can I help you today?
botOutsideHours:
Sorry, we are currently outside the official working hours of the clinic. 🕒

Please leave your details or phone number and the clinic team will contact you as soon as the next official working hours begin to coordinate and book your appointment!
botLimitReached:
We deeply apologize, the maximum number of bookings available for today at the clinic has been reached ({max} bookings). 🔴

Please contact us directly by phone to register your name on the waiting list, or try again tomorrow to book a new appointment. Thank you for your understanding!
botBookingSystemReady:
Welcome to the smart direct booking system! 📅
Please fill out the booking form below to register your appointment instantly in the doctor's control panel and we will contact you to confirm.
botBookingSuccessDesc: Your request has been instantly recorded in the doctor's dashboard. The chatbot received your booking successfully and we will call you to confirm.
botInputPlaceholder: Ask the chatbot or type your question here...
botBookingTriggerResponse: Welcome! Please fill out the appointment booking form below.
reportCopied: Full report text copied to clipboard! 📋
noBookingsMatch: No registered bookings match your search currently
tryChatbotLeft: Try the chatbot on the left to book an appointment and monitor it here instantly!
botAttachedImageDesc: Ready to send with your message
botPlaceholderText: Type your message to the smart medical assistant here...
